title: Build AI support chatbot for all products
description: AI chatbot using our own vLLM! Answers customer questions, helps with setup, troubleshoots issues. Embedded in all product UIs. Learns from docs. Escalates to human support when needed.
result: Built RoadSupport AI Chatbot - Product #66\! Live chat widget with AI responses, 24/7 availability, multilingual support, knowledge base integration. Deployed: https://support-chatbot.blackroad-hello.pages.dev. 3 AI PRODUCTS IN ONE SESSION\!
